Achaea Help Files
Achaea has hundreds of help files to you learn about Achaea. This is a copy of the in-game help file structure. HELP in-game will show you this same menu.
Help:
[
Return to Help Index
]
Tea
Tea
is not
Kawhe
----------------
Anybody, however limited in capacity, can make kawhe. To that unwashed
mass
we
leave
this unsavoury
task
.
Go
. Enjoy that
muck
.
Tea People Only
---------------
Now for those
who
remain, let us
explore
the true flavour, the endless delight
of tea!
Tea must be prepared with care, thought, and yes, even reverence. Take the
proper
container
and
fill
it with the proper amount of tea. How much is that?
Tut tut!
To those who know, no explanation is necessary.
To those who do not know, no explanation is possible.
With your container now full, add boiling water.
Agitation
---------
The mistake here is to leave it alone. Do not do this! Agitate frequently. At
least three
minutes
of agitation is required to release the fullness of the
tea's virtues.
If you cannot be bothered to undertake this ritual in its completeness, by all
means, go back to kawhe. There are people just like you doing it every
day
.
Enjoy their company, and leave the rest of us to our tea.
Now
---
Serve with care.
Achaea is developed and published by
Iron Realms Entertainment.
